title: Apple And HP Inc.: Q4 Offers These Buffett Picks On A Platter
text: Judging by the earnings report (“ER”) from the FAAMG stocks so far, I expect the market volatility to heighten during Q4. And such market volatility can offer excellent stocks at an enticing entry price, including both Apple and HP Inc., two large holdings that Warren Buffett picked.

title: HP Inc.: An Excellent Earnings Yield To Consider
text: The company currently has an earnings yield of 15%, which is excellent when you consider that almost all earnings are likely paid out in dividends and used for share buybacks. Berkshire Hathaway recently bought shares. Given the earnings yield and the likelihood of it returning to a higher multiple, perhaps you should too.

title: HP Inc.: Computers Pay Attractive Dividends
text: Macroeconomic headwinds, including low consumer confidence and an unfavorable FX environment are likely to keep negatively impacting HPQ's business in the near term. On the other hand, the firm has a strong track record of paying safe and sustainable quarterly dividends.

title: Dell Stock vs. HP Stock: Comparing Two Computer Giants By The Numbers
text: Dell and HP are two of the largest computer manufacturers in the United States, usually controlling over 50% of the PC market. Here's what investors need to know about their latest financial reporting.

title: HP Announces Commencement of Change of Control Offer for 4.750% Notes due 2029
text: PALO ALTO, Calif., Oct. 19, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- HP Inc. (NYSE: HPQ) (“HP” or the “Company”) announced today that it commenced a change of control repurchase offer to holders (the “Holders”) for any and all outstanding 4.750% notes due 2029 (the “Notes”) of the Company for cash (such offer to purchase, the “Post-Acquisition Change of Control Repurchase Offer”).

title: The 7 Most Undervalued Long-Term Stocks to Buy Now
text: My task today is to find seven of the most undervalued long-term stocks to buy now. We need to determine two things before stock selection takes place.

title: 1 Reason You Don't Want to Own PC Makers Like HP and Dell Right Now
text: Last quarter's tepid deliveries of new PCs suggest a sales slowdown is already well underway.

title: 11 October Inflation Busting Dividend Dogs Ready To Buy
text: March-April, 2022, UBS, Kiplinger, and Barron's analysts and reporters combined to list five-sets of stocks sorted-as: “Inflation Busters for 2022.” Those five-articles revealed 48 equities, with 43 paying-dividends.

title: PC Shipments Decline in Q3 on Lower Demand, Macroeconomic Woes
text: Tepid consumer demand for PCs, high inventory levels, and geopolitical challenges induce the steepest personal computer shipment decline in years in the third quarter, according to Gartner.

title: HP, Lenovo and Dell see PC shipments continue to decline in Q3, while Apple bucks the trend
text: Shipments of personal computers continued to decline for the third quarter, according to data from IDC. Apple was the only manufacturer to see shipments rise.

title: New Strong Sell Stocks for October 6th
text: HP, SBSW and FXLV have been added to the Zacks Rank #5 (Strong Sell) List on October 6, 2022.

title: This Is the Best Time to Buy These 7 Long-Term Warren Buffett Stocks
text: There are approximately 50 long-term Warren Buffett stocks to choose from. These range from the highest market value of Apple (NASDAQ: AAPL ) at $2.5 trillion to the lowest — Liberty Latin America Class C (NASDAQ: LILAK ) — with a value of around $1.5 billion.

title: This Is the Best Time to Buy These 7 Long-Term Tech Stocks
text: The stock market is now creating an opportunity for investors. Long-term tech stocks to buy abound, following some seriously negative sentiment and declining stock prices over the last month.

title: 7 Warren Buffett Stocks That Are Too Cheap to Ignore
text: While investors as a rule should rely mostly on their due diligence before making decisions, certain experts may help improve the probabilities of success, thus bolstering the case for cheap Warren Buffett stocks. Known as the Oracle of Omaha, Buffett represents a living legend, providing a wealth of great ideas amid troubling times.

title: DELL Rides on Strong Partner Base Amid Growing Challenges
text: Dell Technologies (DELL) is riding on an expanding partner base despite facing a challenging demand environment.
